instruction: Restore the thin black frame square on the wifi icon to where it should be. (very subtle — only 2px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/wifi.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.288 15.038a5.25 5.25 0 0 1 7.424 0M5.106 11.856c3.807-3.808 9.98-3.808 13.788 0M1.924 8.674c5.565-5.565 14.587-5.565 20.152 0M12.53 18.22l-.53.53-.53-.53a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="2" y="2" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/wifi.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.288 15.038a5.25 5.25 0 0 1 7.424 0M5.106 11.856c3.807-3.808 9.98-3.808 13.788 0M1.924 8.674c5.565-5.565 14.587-5.565 20.152 0M12.53 18.22l-.53.53-.53-.53a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
